svg.title: 4-Bit Parallel Adder – Block Diagram and Truth Table
svg.desc: Block diagram of a 4-bit parallel adder with 4 full adders, and a truth table with simulation output values.
svg.text: Cin = Carry In, Cout = Carry Out, S[i] = Sum Bit i
4-bit parallel adder – truth table (with your test cases)
